hero_subtitle: SFTY organizes provider outputs, case workflows, regulatory rules and audit evidence into one operational layer to help VASPs prepare for AML inspections efficiently and transparently.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit readiness weakens across disconnected tools
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and extra manual effort when AML case data, sanctions screening, and regulatory evidence are scattered across separate systems. This fragmentation complicates preparing for regulatory inspections and weakens the defensibility of compliance reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes sanctions screening, case details, provider outputs and regulatory evidence into one unified workflow, enabling compliance teams to prepare audit-ready materials efficiently for AML inspections.
workflow_description: SFTY routes screening and monitoring alerts through structured reviews, case creation, decision logging and evidence preservation to support AML inspection readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond scattered evidence. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented AML checks into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence, enabling compliance teams to prepare clear, defensible materials for regulatory inspection.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preparing for AML inspections by preserving evidentiary records, orchestrating providers, and enabling controlled deployments for defensible compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams with a connected operational layer connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening, case management and reporting across jurisdictions and providers.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY structure suspicious activity workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns alerts and provider outputs into structured cases with decision logs, reviewer actions and linked evidence to support suspicious activity review and escalation.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision records, provider results and supporting evidence to create an audit-ready trail for regulatory inspections and internal review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers without replacement, applying internal policies across a harmonized compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above providers and orchestrates their outputs into workflows, cases and reports without replacing the underlying KYC, KYT or screening vendors.
final_title: Prepare audit-ready AML evidence with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY structures provider outputs, case workflows and regulatory rules into defensible AML inspection evidence packages.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
